stonetop.summary: A tiny thought-form spirit created through meditation and sacrifice, eager to serve its maker.

system.concept: A tiny thought-form spirit created through meditation and sacrifice, eager to serve its maker.
system.description: A tulpa is a tiny spirit-construct, conjured into being through months of meditative practice and the permanent sacrifice of a piece of your own vitality. Its maker names and describes it, then picks its further tags, its instinct, two more moves, and its cost; it serves as a follower. Naive and eager, it might be fierce, kind, sly, timid, or willful, as you imagine it.
